elements.label: Description
elements.value: Each fruit has a cute kawaii face with dot eyes and a small mouth. Face parameters control relative positioning as fractions of item radius.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/properties/faces.schema.json, set facet_eye_x to {{facet_eye_x}}]
Set FACE_EYE_OFFSET_X to {{facet_eye_x}}.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/properties/faces.schema.json, set facet_eye_y to {{facet_eye_y}}]
Set FACE_EYE_OFFSET_Y to {{facet_eye_y}}.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/properties/faces.schema.json, set facet_eye_size to {{facet_eye_size}}]
Set FACE_EYE_SIZE to {{facet_eye_size}}.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/visualidentity/properties/faces.schema.json, set facet_mouth_y to {{facet_mouth_y}}]
Set FACE_MOUTH_Y to {{facet_mouth_y}}.
